notes: Elicia's listener-loop verbs. Replaces the Fool's waiter-loop (greet/listen/deliver/sit_with) and the Magician's maker-loop (draft/burn/record/tune). Listener-loop is RECORD / TRANSCRIBE / REWIND / PLAY BACK. Buyable pool is TAPES — short fragments captured tonight that can be replayed for delayed effects. Second stat is DOUBT (rises bad); Insight replaces Inspiration as the spendable currency.

cards.title: RECORD
cards.flavor: Roll tape on what's being said right now. The reel ticks once.

cards.title: TRANSCRIBE
cards.flavor: Listen back to a fragment and put it into words. Costs insight; the sentence comes loose.

cards.title: REWIND
cards.flavor: Spool back to a moment you almost missed.

cards.title: PLAY BACK
cards.flavor: Play back what they said to themselves. Some visitors only finish their thought after they hear it once.

cards.title: CALL IN
cards.flavor: Phone a scheduled visitor and bring them in early. The booth is open.

cards.title: PATCH
cards.flavor: Re-route a cable. The booth hears the lounge, the lounge hears the booth. Two spaces become one for a turn.

cards.title: SHELVE
cards.flavor: Move a finished tape onto the wall. The booth is one tape lighter; tonight has one more conversation worth of room.

cards.title: THE LONG QUIET
cards.flavor: Stop the room. The next visitor speaks for as long as it takes — patience does not tick for one full turn. Elicia waits the way only she can wait.

cards.title: VEIL
cards.flavor: Close the curtain on the booth window. The visitor inside hears nothing but themselves. Their next step happens twice as fast.

cards.title: SCROLL
cards.flavor: Pull a tape from the wall and play one sentence from someone else's session. The room remembers.
